title: Hornet Removal in Belmont, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Belmont, Bronx. Safe elimination of hornet nests from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Belmont, known as the Bronx's Little Italy, faces unique hornet challenges due to its mix of residential homes, bustling Arthur Avenue restaurants, and tree-lined streets. Our professional hornet removal service protects Belmont families and businesses from aggressive hornet nests with safe, effective treatments. Best Pest Control NYC provides same-day emergency hornet removal throughout the Belmont neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Belmont residents for years, understanding the specific pest pressures of this historic Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate hornet nests while protecting your family, pets, and the vibrant community atmosphere that makes Belmont special.
localContext: Belmont's dense mix of multi-family homes, classic brownstones, and commercial properties along Arthur Avenue creates numerous opportunities for hornets to build nests in eaves, awnings, and outdoor dining areas. The neighborhood's mature trees near the Bronx Zoo and proximity to green spaces make hornet activity particularly common during spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Belmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal service throughout Belmont, typically arriving within 2-4 hours of your call. For emergency situations involving aggressive hornets near entryways or outdoor dining areas, we prioritize immediate response to protect residents and customers.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes thorough inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, and disposal of the nest. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide upfront quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Belmont during certain times of year?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity peaks in Belmont from late spring through early fall, with August and September being the most active months. The neighborhood's combination of residential gardens, restaurant patios, and proximity to parkland creates ideal conditions for hornet colonies to establish and grow.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments and professional protective equipment to safely eliminate hornet nests. We advise keeping children and pets indoors during treatment, but the area is typically safe to use again within a few hours after our technicians complete the removal.
